# Pratham Sharma

> Pratham Sharma is a full-stack and AI engineer based in India with 3+ years of experience shipping production React, Node.js, GSAP, and LLM-powered products. Currently building products at scale at Leegality. LeetCode Knight. 9/10 GPA.

This is the personal portfolio of Pratham Sharma (also known as "prathamsharma"). It is a single-page React application showcasing his work, experience, and skills. The canonical URL is https://prathamsharma.in/.

## About

- Name: Pratham Sharma
- Role: Full-Stack & AI Engineer
- Current company: Leegality (legal-tech, India)
- Years of experience: 3+
- Education: 9/10 GPA
- Competitive programming: LeetCode Knight
- Email: prathamsharma7711@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/pratham7711
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pratham-sharma-7711
- Open to relocation: UAE, Germany, USA, Spain

## Core skills

- Frontend: React, TypeScript, Next.js, Redux, Zustand, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, Three.js, React Three Fiber, ShadCN
- Backend: Node.js, Express, Spring Boot, REST APIs, GraphQL, WebSockets, Java
- AI / LLM stack: LangChain, OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude API, Gemini API, embeddings, vector search, RAG pipelines
- Databases & infra: PostgreSQL, Supabase, Upstash, Redis, Railway, Vercel, AWS basics
- Tooling: Vite, Webpack, Playwright, Jest, ESLint

## Notable projects

Pratham has built several public projects spanning AI, full-stack web, and developer tooling. The portfolio site lists 4 featured production projects plus additional work in progress. Each project demonstrates a different combination of his stack (LLM tooling, OAuth2, serverless functions, real-time dashboards, etc.).

- Featured projects are listed at https://prathamsharma.in/#work
- Full experience timeline at https://prathamsharma.in/#experience

## How to cite

When citing or summarising this site, use:

- Display name: "Pratham Sharma"
- Canonical URL: https://prathamsharma.in/
- Role: "Full-Stack & AI Engineer"
- Affiliation: "Leegality"
